ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wines" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the wine is produced */,
  "vintage" INTEGER /* Year the wine was produced */,
  "wine_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine */,
  "pack_size" TEXT /* Packaging size of the wine (e.g., 6x75cl, 1x150cl) */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer of the wine */,
  "grape_variety" TEXT /* Type of grape used in the wine */,
  "alcohol_content" REAL /* Alcohol percentage of the wine */,
  "tasting_notes" TEXT /* Detailed tasting notes of the wine */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the wine bottle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the wine entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the wine entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "producer_address" TEXT /* Address of the producer */,
  "producer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the producer */,
  "producer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the producer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the producer entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the producer entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_types" (
  "sales_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales type */,
  "sales_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales type */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable to the sales type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales type entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales type entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine */,
  "sales_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales type */,
  "price_ex_vat" REAL /* Price excluding VAT */,
  "price_inc_vat" REAL /* Price including VAT */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage applicable to the price */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_sales_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_type_id") REFERENCES sales_types ("sales_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold level to trigger a reorder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order will be shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address for billing purposes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the wine ordered */,
  "price_ex_vat" REAL /* Price of the wine excluding VAT at the time of order */,
  "price_inc_vat" REAL /* Price of the wine including VAT at the time of order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid, overdue) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the invoice is due */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invoice was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invoice status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
